title: Moroccan Snapper Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and healthy stir fry recipe combining the freshness of snapper with the warmth of Moroccan spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the snapper fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the snapper from the skillet and set aside.
Add the Moroccan spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the crunchy vegetables and cook until they begin to soften.
Stir in the lime juice and cook for an additional minute.
Return the snapper to the skillet and toss to coat with the vegetable mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
